author: danceratopz
content:
🦓 New mainnet test release: `tests@v20.0.1` — https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests@v20.0.1

**Fusaka only; up to Osaka/BPO2!** This is a [`Z` patch bump](https://steel.ethereum.foundation/docs/execution-specs/running_tests/releases/#versioning-scheme): new tests and tooling.

⏱️ The main driver for this release is a [`consume-enginex`](https://steel.ethereum.foundation/docs/execution-specs/running_tests/running/#enginex) simulator speed-up ([#3122](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/3122)):
- Reduces Engine X pre-alloc groups from `5458` → `3279`, so ~`40%` fewer client boots per run.
- `consume enginex` boots one client per group, so fewer groups means less container churn.
- Results available here (runtimes so far: ~`16min` for geth, ~`21m` for reth, ~`22m` for erigon): https://hive.ethpandaops.io/#/group/generic?suites=eels%2Fconsume-engine%2Ceels%2Fconsume-enginex 


🆕 Also in this release:
- Add Python ports of `sstore_combinations` tests (Istanbul) after they were dropped by a ported-static regeneration sweep <@425274498732916736>.
- New tx-nonce validation (max nonce at the `u64` boundary + overflow) and access-list slot warmth surviving a failed `CREATE2` <@425274498732916736>.
- State-test fixtures now emit `chainId` in the transaction <@755913785620824175>.

PTAL at the [release notes](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests@v20.0.1) for the full list. As always, please ping if there are any issues!
